creator: cem@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Greg V from comment #0)
> intsmb0: <AMD FCH SMBus Controller> at device 20.0 on pci0

Which AMD FCH controller is this?  If this is the new Zen2 stuff, we may be missing support for it in intpm(4).  Anything interesting in 'devinfo -rv'?

Anyone have a datasheet for this FCH?
